title: Future banknotes
excerpt: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency.
content_html:
Future euro banknote design proposals

Our euro banknotes are getting a new look! Designers from all over Europe have reimagined how they may look like, and one of their proposals is to become the next design of the euro banknotes.

Want to have a say on which designs are your favourites?

Share your opinion in our survey!

Browse through the shortlisted designs below

While the ECB provided guidelines for the creation of the designs, the resulting proposals are solely based on the artist's creative rendition. The ECB bears no responsibility for any elements that may or may not be included in the selected design proposals, or that any of the depicted elements will appear in the portrayed way on the final banknotes.

Terms of use

These images depict design proposals for a possible future euro banknote series. It may be used only for information, editorial and news-reporting purposes. Commercial, promotional or merchandising use, alteration, misleading presentation, or any use suggesting ECB or Eurosystem endorsement is not permitted without the ECB’s prior written authorisation. The image must be identified as a design proposal and the ECB acknowledged as the source.

SEE ALSO

Find out more about related content

content_html_zh:
未来欧元纸币设计方案

我们的欧元纸币焕然一新！ 来自欧洲各地的设计师重新构想了它们的外观，他们的建议之一是成为欧元纸币的下一个设计。

想知道您最喜欢哪些设计吗？

在我们的调查中分享您的意见！

浏览下面的入围设计

虽然欧洲央行为设计创作提供了指导方针，但最终的建议仅基于艺术家的创意表现。 欧洲央行对所选设计方案中可能包含或不包含的任何元素，或者任何所描绘的元素将以描绘的方式出现在最终纸币上不承担任何责任。

使用条款

这些图像描绘了未来可能推出的欧元纸币系列的设计方案。 它只能用于信息、编辑和新闻报道目的。 未经欧洲央行事先书面授权，不得进行商业、促销或推销用途、更改、误导性演示或暗示欧洲央行或欧元体系认可的任何用途。 该图像必须被识别为设计方案，并且欧洲央行被承认为来源。

参见

了解更多相关内容
